name: LoopiaLike
short_description: Survival is just the beginning. LoopiaLike is an action roguelite bullet heaven where you unleash devastating spell combos against endless hordes. Master unique magic, forge game-breaking builds, and climb the global leaderboards in this unforgiving survivors-like experience.
detailed_description:
Step into the arena. LoopiaLike is an explosive, fast-paced action roguelite where your mastery of magic is the only thing standing between you and absolute annihilation. Slay thousands, harvest their power, and fuse devastating elements to become an unstoppable force.

Master the Elements

Every run is a blank canvas. Discover countless synergies as you combine fire, ice, lightning, and more into screen-clearing fusions. Will you build an impenetrable fortress of orbiting shields, or a glass-cannon storm of destructive chaos? The choice is yours.

  • Frenetic Survivors-like Action: Face off against relentless screens of enemies where positioning and build strategy mean the difference between life and death.
  • Deep Synergy System: Level up your weapons and discover hidden fusions to exponentially multiply your power.
  • Global Leaderboards: Perfect your runs. Your best survival times and kill scores are pushed straight to the global Steam Leaderboards. Prove you are the ultimate mage.
  • Full Controller Support: Lay back and slay. LoopiaLike is built from the ground up for seamless twin-stick and gamepad action.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Russian, Japanese, Portuguese - Portugal
